results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: 'Know your numbers' is a decade-old wellness cliché with no specific payoff or contrarian edge to stop a scroll.
rationales.clarity: Each slide lands one idea cleanly, though 'the few numbers that count' never names them, leaving the reader hanging.
rationales.audience_fit: The tone is calm and sensible but leans generic-wellness rather than speaking to the tired-by-3pm, overwhelmed-by-advice 25-year-old.
rationales.novelty: 'Track your habits,' 'one place beats five apps,' and 'you can't improve what you don't measure' are among the most recycled lines in health content.
rationales.brand_fit: Hedging is consistent ('may help,' 'can tell') and the CTA ties naturally to the product, but the cover copy is too soft for Vibe's mildly contrarian voice.
rationales.predicted_performance: No hook tension and zero novel insight means saves will be low — this gets scrolled past by the exact audience it targets.
